investigations.risk_reason: SPF fail; DMARC fail; lookalike domain; wire request
investigations.disposition_reason: Final determination: confirmed BEC. Case closed, no further action.
recommended_containment: We blocked the sender domain and quarantined all copies across every mailbox.
We reset the user's password and disabled the account.
recommended_fraud_coordination: We recalled the wire and filed a report with the network.
investigations.narrative: This has been closed as confirmed fraud; no further action required.
